about-me.title: About me
about-me.description-a: Hello! I'm Evan Adams. I am always learning and growing in anything related to computers. I have more than
about-me.description-b: years of experience in building software and web applications,
about-me.description-c: and a B.S. Computer Science from the University of Southern Indiana.

descriptions.Tarkov Informer: A fully loaded Discord Bot written in Python. Tarkov Informer is full of useful commands for any Tarkov server. Detailed item statistics, ammo charts, trader timer, Tarkov time, randomizers, and more!
descriptions.SOC Dashboard: A dashboard interface to expose the Microsoft Graph API in a user friendly way. Utilizes websocket technology to send server-side data dynamically.
descriptions.Digital Signature Verification System fo: A digital signature verification system to verify the signature of pdfs for faculty at the University of Southern Indiana.
descriptions.Dynamic Template for Flask: This is a friendly template utilizing the library Turbo-Flask to create applications that look and feel like single-page apps without using JavaScript.
descriptions.Stash: Stash is a Discord bot that helps you play Escape from Tarkov! This bot takes all the data from Tarkov.dev and exposes it in a user-friendly way. This bot is open source and supported by the team behind Tarkov.dev.
descriptions.Tarkov Tools Discord Bot: This is the official tarkov-tools discord bot.
descriptions.The Algorithms/Python: All algorithms implemented in Python - for education.

education.title: Education
education.description-a: My knowledge in computer science comes from my work, university, and previous projects with friends.
education.description-b: I have also gained knowledge from various platforms such as Udemy and Leetcode.
education.subtitle: Here are some of my certificates:
